schema_id.description: Unique identifier for this schema document

change_id.description: Unique identifier for this change record

baseline_id.description: Identifier of the baseline that was changed

previous_baseline_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the baseline before the change

new_baseline_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the baseline after the change

changed_at.description: Timestamp when the change was applied

changed_by.description: Entity (user or component) that performed the change

reason.description: Rationale for why the baseline was changed

score_delta.description: Overall score difference introduced by the change

case_changes.description: Per-case breakdown of status and score changes

approval_ref.description: Reference to an approval record that authorised this change

warnings.description: Non-fatal issues detected during the baseline change

errors.description: Fatal issues detected during the baseline change
